questions.text: What actually predicts 100M+ views? What separates mega-viral from merely viral?

analysis_runs.method: multi-evidence synthesis: regime_gap (Cohen's d), quantile_gap, bridge paths, nonlinearity detection

questions.text: What minimizes falloff in the first 10 seconds?

analysis_runs.method: target-specific edge analysis: retention_pct_10 + hook_drop_rate as targets

questions.text: What maximizes swipe hold / reduces skip?

analysis_runs.method: target-specific edge analysis: swipe_away_rate + hook_payoff_gap as targets

questions.text: Which pre-upload indicators bridge into which post-upload indicators, and then into views? What is the structural path from controllable inputs to outcomes?

analysis_runs.method: multi-evidence bridge scoring: interaction_r, pathway_strength, pair_correlation, residual_r

questions.text: What does the pre->post->views bridge structure say about the Boba Fett flamethrower hook problem? How do spectacle hooks connect through retention to views?

analysis_runs.method: hook structure analysis: trace hook indicators through retention to views
